Description

  • Uses of Ref in st.orm

    Methods in st.orm that return Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends Entity<?>>
    Ref<E>
    Ref.of(E entity)
    Creates a fully loaded ref instance that wraps the given entity.
    static <T extends Data, ID>
    Ref<T>
    Ref.of(Class<T> type, ID pk)
    Creates a detached ref instance for the given type and primary key.
    static <P extends Projection<ID>, ID>
    Ref<P>
    Ref.of(P projection, ID id)
    Creates a fully loaded ref instance that wraps the given projection along with its primary key.
    Ref<T>
    Ref.unload()
    Returns a ref with the same identity but without data.
    Methods in st.orm with parameters of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <ID, E extends Entity<ID>>
    ID
    Ref.entityId(Ref<E> ref)
    Extracts the primary key from the given entity ref returning a type-safe id.
    static <ID, P extends Projection<ID>>
    ID
    Ref.projectionId(Ref<P> ref)
    Extracts the primary key from the given projection ref returning a type-safe id.

  • Uses of Ref in st.orm.core.repository

    Methods in st.orm.core.repository that return Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Ref<E>
    EntityRepository.ref(E entity)
    Creates a new ref entity instance for the specified entity.
    Ref<E>
    EntityRepository.ref(ID id)
    Creates a new ref entity instance with the specified primary key.
    Ref<P>
    ProjectionRepository.ref(ID id)
    Creates a new ref projection instance with the specified primary key.
    Ref<P>
    ProjectionRepository.ref(P projection, ID id)
    Creates a new ref projection instance with the specified projection.
    Ref<E>
    EntityRepository.unload(E entity)
    Unloads the given entity from memory by converting it into a lightweight ref containing only its primary key.
    Methods in st.orm.core.repository that return types with arguments of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Page<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.pageRef(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
    Returns a page of entity refs using offset-based pagination.
    default Page<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.pageRef(Pageable pageable)
    Returns a page of entity refs using offset-based pagination.
    default Page<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.pageRef(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
    Returns a page of projection refs using offset-based pagination.
    default Page<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.pageRef(Pageable pageable)
    Returns a page of projection refs using offset-based pagination.
    QueryBuilder<E,Ref<E>,ID>
    EntityRepository.selectRef()
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to entities of the type managed by this repository.
    <R extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<E,Ref<R>,ID>
    EntityRepository.selectRef(Class<R> refType)
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to entities of the type managed by this repository.
    QueryBuilder<P,Ref<P>,ID>
    ProjectionRepository.selectRef()
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to projections of the type managed by this repository.
    <R extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<P,Ref<R>,ID>
    ProjectionRepository.selectRef(Class<R> refType)
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to projections of the type managed by this repository.
    default <V extends Data>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> after, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified ref cursor value.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V after, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified cursor value.
    default <V, S> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V extends Data>
    Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> after, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified ref cursor value.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V> Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V after, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified cursor value.
    default <V, S> Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entity refs ordered by the specified key in descending order.
    default <V, S> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entity refs ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker, both in descending order.
    default <V extends Data>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> before, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of entity refs before the specified ref cursor value.

    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Ref<E> ref)
    Deletes an entity from the database by its reference.
    boolean
    EntityRepository.existsByRef(Ref<E> ref)
    Checks if an entity with the specified primary key exists in the database.
    boolean
    ProjectionRepository.existsByRef(Ref<P> ref)
    Checks if a projection with the specified primary key exists in the database.
    <V extends Data>
    Optional<E>
    EntityRepository.findByRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> value)
    Retrieves an entity by the ref value of a unique key field that references another entity.
    Optional<E>
    EntityRepository.findByRef(Ref<E> ref)
    Retrieves an entity based on its primary key, expressed by a ref.
    <V extends Data>
    Optional<P>
    ProjectionRepository.findByRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> value)

    Method parameters in st.orm.core.repository with type arguments of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    EntityRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs)
    Counts the number of entities identified by the provided stream of refs using the default batch size.
    long
    EntityRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Counts the number of entities identified by the provided stream of refs, with the counting process divided into batches of the specified size.
    long
    ProjectionRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs)
    Counts the number of projections identified by the provided stream of refs using the default batch size.
    long
    ProjectionRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Counts the number of projections identified by the provided stream of refs, with the counting process divided into batches of the specified size.
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Iterable<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a collection of entities from the database in batches.
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a stream of entities from the database in batches.
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs, int batchSize)
    Deletes a stream of entities from the database in configurable batch sizes.
    List<E>
    EntityRepository.findAllByRef(Iterable<Ref<E>> refs)
    Retrieves a list of entities based on their primary keys.
    List<P>
    ProjectionRepository.findAllByRef(Iterable<Ref<P>> refs)
    Retrieves a list of projections based on their primary keys.
    Stream<E>
    EntityRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs)
    Retrieves a stream of entities based on their primary keys.
    Stream<E>
    EntityRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Retrieves a stream of entities based on their primary keys.

    ProjectionRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs)
    Retrieves a stream of projections based on their primary keys.
    Stream<P>
    ProjectionRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Retrieves a stream of projections based on their primary keys.

    Method
    Description

    Query.getRefList(Class<T> type, Class<?> pkType)
    Execute a SELECT query and return the resulting rows as a list of ref instances.

    Stream<Ref<T>>
    Query.getRefStream(Class<T> type, Class<?> pkType)
    Execute a SELECT query and return the resulting rows as a stream of ref instances.
    Methods in st.orm.core.template with parameters of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final <V extends Data>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> after, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified ref cursor value, ordered by the specified key in ascending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor with a ref-based unique key, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in ascending order.
    final <V extends Data>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> before, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified ref cursor value, ordered by the specified key in descending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified composite cursor with a ref-based unique key, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in descending order.
    final <V extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Ref<V> ref)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified ref.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Ref<T> ref)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified primary key of the table, expressed by a ref.
    abstract <V extends Data>
    PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Ref<V> ref)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified ref.
    abstract <V extends Data>
    PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereAny(Metamodel<?,V> path, Ref<V> ref)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified ref.
    abstract PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereAnyRef(Ref<?> ref)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified primary key of the table, expressed by a ref.
    abstract PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereRef(Ref<T> ref)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified primary key of the table, expressed by a ref.

    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified primary keys of the table, expressed by a ref.

    abstract PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereRef(Iterable<? extends Ref<T>> it)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified primary keys of the table, expressed by a ref.
    abstract <V extends Data>
    PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereRef(Metamodel<T,V> path, Iterable<? extends Ref<V>> it)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified refs.

    Method
    Description

    PredicateBuilder<T,R,?>

    Creates a new instance of PredicateBuilder for the specified path, operator, and values.

    PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    PredicateBuilderFactory.createRefWithId(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<Ref<V>> o)
    Creates a new instance of PredicateBuilder for the specified path, operator, and values with an ID.

    JoinedEntityHelper.deleteBatchByRef(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a batch of joined entities by reference from all extension and base tables.

  • Uses of Ref in st.orm.repository

    Methods in st.orm.repository that return Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Ref<E>
    EntityRepository.ref(E entity)
    Creates a new ref entity instance for the specified entity.
    Ref<E>
    EntityRepository.ref(ID id)
    Creates a new ref entity instance with the specified primary key.
    Ref<P>
    ProjectionRepository.ref(ID id)
    Creates a new ref projection instance with the specified primary key.
    Ref<P>
    ProjectionRepository.ref(P projection, ID id)
    Creates a new ref projection instance with the specified projection.
    Ref<E>
    EntityRepository.unload(E entity)
    Unloads the given entity from memory by converting it into a lightweight ref containing only its primary key.
    Methods in st.orm.repository that return types with arguments of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.findAllRef()
    Returns a list of refs to all entities of the type supported by this repository.
    Page<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.pageRef(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
    Returns a page of entity refs using offset-based pagination.
    Page<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.pageRef(Pageable pageable)
    Returns a page of entity refs using offset-based pagination.
    Page<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.pageRef(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
    Returns a page of projection refs using offset-based pagination.
    Page<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.pageRef(Pageable pageable)
    Returns a page of projection refs using offset-based pagination.
    Stream<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.selectAllRef()
    Returns a stream of refs to all entities of the type supported by this repository.
    QueryBuilder<E,Ref<E>,ID>
    EntityRepository.selectRef()
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to entities of the type managed by this repository.
    <R extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<E,Ref<R>,ID>
    EntityRepository.selectRef(Class<R> refType)
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to entities of the type managed by this repository.

    ProjectionRepository.selectRef()
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to projections of the type managed by this repository.
    <R extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<P,Ref<R>,ID>
    ProjectionRepository.selectRef(Class<R> refType)
    Creates a new query builder for selecting refs to projections of the type managed by this repository.
    <V extends Data>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> after, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified ref cursor value.
    <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V after, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified cursor value.

    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.

    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V after, int size)

    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entity refs ordered by the specified key in descending order.
    <V, S> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entity refs ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker, both in descending order.

    Description

    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Ref<E> ref)
    Deletes an entity from the database by its reference.

    EntityRepository.existsByRef(Ref<E> ref)

    boolean

    <V extends Data>
    Optional<E>
    EntityRepository.findByRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> value)

    Retrieves an entity based on its primary key, expressed by a ref.

    Method parameters in st.orm.repository with type arguments of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    EntityRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs)
    Counts the number of entities identified by the provided stream of refs using the default batch size.
    long
    EntityRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Counts the number of entities identified by the provided stream of refs, with the counting process divided into batches of the specified size.
    long
    ProjectionRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs)
    Counts the number of projections identified by the provided stream of refs using the default batch size.
    long
    ProjectionRepository.countByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Counts the number of projections identified by the provided stream of refs, with the counting process divided into batches of the specified size.
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Iterable<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a collection of entities from the database in batches.
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a stream of entities from the database in batches.
    void
    EntityRepository.deleteByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs, int batchSize)
    Deletes a stream of entities from the database in configurable batch sizes.
    List<E>
    EntityRepository.findAllByRef(Iterable<Ref<E>> refs)
    Retrieves a list of entities based on their primary keys.
    List<P>
    ProjectionRepository.findAllByRef(Iterable<Ref<P>> refs)
    Retrieves a list of projections based on their primary keys.
    Stream<E>
    EntityRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs)
    Retrieves a stream of entities based on their primary keys.
    Stream<E>
    EntityRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<E>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Retrieves a stream of entities based on their primary keys.

    Retrieves a stream of projections based on their primary keys.

    ProjectionRepository.selectByRef(Stream<Ref<P>> refs, int chunkSize)
    Retrieves a stream of projections based on their primary keys.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends Data, ID>
    Ref<T>
    QueryTemplate.ref(Class<T> type, ID id)
    Creates a ref instance for the specified record type and pk.
    <T extends Data, ID>
    Ref<T>
    QueryTemplate.ref(T record, ID id)
    Creates a ref instance for the specified record type and id.
    Methods in st.orm.template that return types with arguments of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <T extends Data>
    List<Ref<T>>
    Query.getRefList(Class<T> type, Class<?> pkType)
    Execute a SELECT query and return the resulting rows as a list of ref instances.
    <T extends Data>
    Stream<Ref<T>>
    Query.getRefStream(Class<T> type, Class<?> pkType)
    Execute a SELECT query and return the resulting rows as a stream of ref instances.
    Methods in st.orm.template with parameters of type Ref
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final <V extends Data>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> after, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified ref cursor value, ordered by the specified key in ascending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination with a ref-typed unique key: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
    final <V extends Data>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> before, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified ref cursor value, ordered by the specified key in descending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination with a ref-typed unique key: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.

    QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>

    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified ref.

    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified primary key of the table, expressed by a ref.
